title: [Twilight Gallery, Seasonal Art]
description: A trio-bladed mounted vellum fan hangs on one of the dark blue textured canvas walls, and a domed white stucco ceiling rises overhead.  A thin gold-edge black runner sits in one corner of a black-checked white tile floor.  There is a heavy white granite counter on one side of the shop and a Vornavian silk-lined display case on the other.
